LABEL: Medicare Status Code – January through December 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates how a beneficiary currently qualifies for Medicare – January through December. 

SHORT NAME: MDCR_STUS_CD_01 
MDCR_STUS_CD_02 
MDCR_STUS_CD_03 
MDCR_STUS_CD_04 
MDCR_STUS_CD_05 
MDCR_STUS_CD_06 
 MDCR_STUS_CD_07 
MDCR_STUS_CD_08 
MDCR_STUS_CD_09 
MDCR_STUS_CD_10 
MDCR_STUS_CD_11 
MDCR_STUS_CD_12 
LONG NAME: MDCR_STATUS_CODE_01
